qas.a: Arming and use of force by Air Force personnel, objectively reasonable force
Using force that would cause serious bodily harm or death
Goal is to gain and maintain 100% control

qas.q: Application of force encompasses three elements

qas.a: Mechanical, physical or mental recourse used to gain control
Application of tools in forms of techniques or procedures
Correlation of tools and tactics to produce timely and effective application

qas.q: Use of deadly force - authority AFI 31-117 pre conditions
qas.a: Self defense, defense of others, secure assets vital to national security

qas.q: Security forces must require what for realizability
